observationPurpose: Define how Montgomery would be monitored during a separately authorized future observation period without activating Montgomery in V580.
observationPrerequisites: V580 readiness package accepted by implementation-readiness review.
Separate production authorization and activation change approval obtained if activation is ever pursued.
Baseline protected-system and rollback checks confirmed immediately before any future observation window.
observationMetrics: Activation state and production authorization state
Issue count, severity, owner, and time-to-triage
reviewCadence: Daily review during any future observation period
Closeout review before any subsequent milestone
escalationTriggers: Artifact reference missing or changed unexpectedly
Containment ambiguity involving Montgomery/Liberty boundary expectations
Any indication of runtime, production registry, Supabase, migration, or data/ mutation
Activation or production flag enabled without separate authorization
rollbackTriggerMonitoring: Monitor V579 rollback triggers before, during, and after any future observation period.
Escalate immediately if protected-system mutation is suspected.
protectedSystemMonitoring: production registry records not created or modified
activationSeparationNote: This plan does not activate Montgomery and does not authorize production use.
